title: teucrium angustifolium
intro: Teucrium angustifolium, also known as narrow-leaved germander or stinking germander, is a perennial herbaceous plant native to North America, characterized by its small, blue or white flowers. The medicinal properties of Teucrium angustifolium are attributed to its essential oil, which contains compounds with antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to treat digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. Teucrium angustifolium can be prepared as a herbal remedy in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
